seasonContext: We are currently in SS26, week 63 of 26, with about 3.6 months left in the selling season. Sales typically ramp up significantly from March to June.

briefing.morningGreeting: Today's sales are steady with a revenue of $2,123,330 and a gross margin of 54%. The blended sell-through rate is strong at 74%.
briefing.healthContext: The health metrics reflect a solid performance overall, but we need to address some slow-moving items to maintain momentum.

salesAnalytics.revenueInsight: Revenue is up compared to last spring, with a strong performance from top brands like ICHI and RD STYLE.
salesAnalytics.brandInsight: Top performers include ICHI, RD STYLE, and SADIE AND SAGE, while CULTURE and GLAMOROUS are struggling with very low sell-through rates.
salesAnalytics.channelInsight: Sales from POS are significantly higher than online, indicating a strong in-store performance.

sellThrough.overallInsight: The blended sell-through is 74%, which is healthy but indicates room for improvement in certain categories.
sellThrough.topPerformers: Reorder ICHI CORNSTALK JACKET, RD STYLE SAYLOR BLOUSE, and DAZE PLEASER HIGH RISE ANKLE JEAN due to their strong sell-through rates.
sellThrough.slowMovers: Address slow movers like GENTLE FAWN PHOEBE CREAM KNIT TOP and ICHI 70'S SUNGLASSES by marking them down or bundling with other items.
sellThrough.brandRecommendations: Grow Z SUPPLY and SADIE AND SAGE due to their solid performance; maintain ICHI and RD STYLE; reduce orders for CULTURE and GLAMOROUS.

inventoryHealth.agingInsight: There is a concern with dead stock, particularly among slow-moving items that have not sold in weeks.
inventoryHealth.categoryWOS: Focus on replenishing the TOP and SWEATER categories, which are performing well but have higher weeks of supply.
inventoryHealth.sizeGaps: Address size gaps by increasing inventory for size M, which is under-bought, while reducing size XL and XXL, which are over-bought.

buyPlanning.otbContext: We are properly stocked overall, but some categories need attention to avoid overstocking.
buyPlanning.seasonalComparison: SS26 is tracking better than SS25, especially with the addition of the Halifax store.
buyPlanning.actionItems: 1. Reorder top-performing styles immediately. 2. Reduce orders for slow-moving brands. 3. Analyze and adjust size inventory for better alignment with demand.

customers.vipInsight: Top customers are placing multiple orders, indicating strong loyalty; consider a VIP program to reward them.
customers.segmentInsight: The customer mix is diverse, but focus on retaining high-frequency buyers to boost overall sales.

metricsSummary: Season context: SS26 week 63 of 26. Roughly 3.6 months remain in the selling season. Overall: revenue $2,123,330, gross margin 54%, blended sell-through 74%, inventory at cost $342,406, inventory at retail $862,975, annualized turns 2.4x. Top 10 brands by revenue: ICHI ($530,800, ST 72%, GM 63%, sold 7,930, stock 3,159); B YOUNG ($294,861, ST 71%, GM 63%, sold 4,460, stock 1,853); RD STYLE ($256,282, ST 80%, GM 62%, sold 3,921, stock 987); Z SUPPLY ($188,942, ST 77%, GM 57%, sold 1,780, stock 525); DAZE ($179,748, ST 73%, GM 56%, sold 1,253, stock 464); SADIE AND SAGE ($114,270, ST 83%, GM 57%, sold 1,357, stock 273); PILGRIM ($111,599, ST 69%, GM 60%, sold 2,369, stock 1,051); DEX ($101,982, ST 83%, GM 61%, sold 1,524, stock 303); DELUC ($80,029, ST 77%, GM 58%, sold 912, stock 279); SAINT TROPEZ ($74,576, ST 59%, GM 59%, sold 994, stock 695). Bottom 5 brands by sell-through: CULTURE (17%, $15, stock 5); GLAMOROUS (32%, $687, stock 43); CAMILLE (33%, $86, stock 8); AMADY (40%, $118, stock 3); STEVE MADDEN (42%, $505, stock 11). Categories: TOP (ST 68%, WOS 26.0, stock 3,798, revenue $463,654); SWEATER (ST 84%, WOS 18.0, stock 875, revenue $340,492); DENIM (ST 74%, WOS 24.0, stock 731, revenue $261,925); PANT (ST 77%, WOS 16.0, stock 1,007, revenue $255,019); JACKET (ST 80%, WOS 26.0, stock 270, revenue $139,651); CARDIGAN (ST 77%, WOS 31.0, stock 440, revenue $121,410); DRESS (ST 68%, WOS 21.0, stock 579, revenue $113,667); JEWELRY (ST 70%, WOS 36.0, stock 949, revenue $104,720); ACCESSORIES (ST 70%, WOS 50.0, stock 640, revenue $58,570); SKIRT (ST 82%, WOS 12.0, stock 177, revenue $54,626); VEST (ST 91%, WOS 7.0, stock 72, revenue $45,617); BLAZER (ST 55%, WOS 52.0, stock 258, revenue $31,847). Reorder alerts count: 7. Reorder-now styles: ICHI — CORNSTALK JACKET (0.2/wk, 100%); ICHI — BLACK MESH BALLET FLAT (0.1/wk, 100%); B YOUNG — CHERRY OVERSIZED CREWNECK SWEATER (0.0/wk, 100%); RD STYLE — SAYLOR BLOUSE (CREAM) (0.1/wk, 100%); DAZE — PLEASER HIGH RISE ANKLE JEAN (BLACK) (0.4/wk, 83%); SADIE AND SAGE — CREAM WIDE LEG DENIM (0.0/wk, 100%); SAGE THE LABEL — NAVY STRETCH TOP (0.0/wk, 100%). Top sold-out styles by velocity: ICHI CORNSTALK JACKET (0.2/wk, 100%, 6.8 weeks); RD STYLE SAYLOR BLOUSE (CREAM) (0.1/wk, 100%, 29.4 weeks); ICHI BLACK MESH BALLET FLAT (0.1/wk, 100%, 47.6 weeks); SADIE AND SAGE CREAM WIDE LEG DENIM (0.0/wk, 100%, 51.9 weeks); SAGE THE LABEL NAVY STRETCH TOP (0.0/wk, 100%, 47.6 weeks). Size gaps under-bought: M (+4 pts; demand 25%, buy 21%). Size gaps over-bought: XXL (-4 pts; demand 1%, buy 5%); XL (-3 pts; demand 7%, buy 10%); XS (-2 pts; demand 15%, buy 17%). Store breakdown: Saint John: $1,012,668 revenue, 52%, 14,290 units, AOV $147; Moncton: $581,486 revenue, 55%, 7,709 units, AOV $182; Halifax: $529,176 revenue, 54%, 7,071 units, AOV $154. Best performers: ICHI — KATE OFFICE WIDE LEG TROUSER (BLK) (28 units, $2,713); DAZE — LOOSE STRAIGHT LEG CUFFED DENIM (28 units, $4,188); PILGRIM — VALKYRIA SET (GOLD) (28 units, $1,614); PILGRIM — PILGRIM JUA CHUNKY GOLD HOOPS (25 units, $1,123); RD STYLE — KERWIN CROP SHIRT (WHITE) (25 units, $1,418); PILGRIM — DECLAN GOLD HOOPS (25 units, $755); RD STYLE — SELBY FUNNEL NECK VEST (25 units, $1,374); PILGRIM — GIFT WITH PURCHASE (PEARL) (25 units, $0). Slow movers: GENTLE FAWN — PHOEBE CREAM KNIT TOP (1 units, $79, 0.0/wk); ICHI — 70'S SUNGLASSES (1 units, $49, 0.0/wk); SAINT TROPEZ — DEEP DENIM TROUSER (1 units, $127, 0.0/wk); RD STYLE — SUPER SOFT WIDE LEG CASUAL PANT (DARK IVY) (1 units, $89, 0.0/wk); B YOUNG — MIDI PUFFER VEST (1 units, $103, 0.0/wk); RD STYLE — TIMELESS BLACK OFF SHOULDER TOP (1 units, $63, 0.0/wk); PILGRIM — BRENDA TEXTURED GOLD HOOPS (1 units, $48, 0.0/wk); SADIE AND SAGE — JADE OPEN BACK MAXI DRESS (1 units, $65, 0.0/wk). Customers: total 6,904, with orders 2,024, total spent $606,987. Top customers: Alissa DeWare ($0, 32 orders); Alison Bulmer ($0, 16 orders); Alexandra Woodworth ($0, 47 orders); Linda Boudreau ($0, 29 orders); Karen Thomas ($0, 30 orders). Channels: 30d revenue $32,432 with POS $25,576 and online $6,856.
